ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that offers this menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item's image */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g. 'appetizer', 'entree') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that fulfilled the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g. 'pending', 'in_progress', 'delivered') */,
  "delivery_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests for the item (e.g. 'no cheese', 'extra sauce') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menus ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this delivery belongs to */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the delivery */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time of the delivery */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address of the delivery */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_personnel" (
  "delivery_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the delivery personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the delivery personnel */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used by the delivery personnel (e.g. car, bike, scooter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_assignments" (
  "delivery_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery assignment */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery that this assignment belongs to */,
  "delivery_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery personnel assigned to this delivery */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_assignments_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_assignments_delivery_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_personnel_id") REFERENCES delivery_personnel ("delivery_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. credit card, cash) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g. 'pending', 'paid', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the delivery (e.g. 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_status" (
  "delivery_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery status */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery that this status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g. 'delivered', 'en_route', 'cancelled') */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_status_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery that this instruction belongs to */,
  "instruction" TEXT /* Text of the instruction */,
  "instruction_date" TEXT /* Date the instruction was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructions_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_address" (
  "delivery_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery address */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery that this address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Text of the delivery address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the delivery address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the delivery address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_address_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amount */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery that this amount belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the delivery */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount of the delivery */,
  "tip" REAL /* Tip amount of the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amounts_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_assignments" (
  "promotion_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion assignment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this promotion belongs to */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion assigned to this order */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_assignments_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_assignments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
